description_long: This jewelry store is housed in a three-story stone building with a symmetrical facade and classical architectural elements. The front features large arched windows on the upper floors and rectangular windows on the ground floor, all framed with dark trim. A prominent black double-door entrance is flanked by two decorative lanterns and potted plants, while a covered balcony with white columns and lush green vines extends above the entrance. The side and rear walls are plain, with minimal ornamentation and regular window placement. The roof is pitched with multiple gables and two visible chimneys, and the overall color palette is a mix of beige stone, black accents, and greenery.
description: A three-story stone jewelry store with arched windows, a black double-door entrance, a balcony with vines, and classical architectural details.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with black double doors, flanked by lanterns and potted plants, a balcony with white columns and green vines, and large arched windows above.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain beige stone wall with no windows or ornamentation, and the edge of the balcony and roofline visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a symmetrical arrangement of rectangular windows and minimal decorative features, with the pitched roof and chimneys visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain wall, the edge of the balcony, and a human figure for scale.
attribute_lighting_fixtures: Two black lantern-style sconces flanking the main entrance, mounted on either side of the double doors.
